case_title: SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC. VS. ISAAC JORDON JR ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JORDON JR, ISAAC
